# Planning Brief - 2026-07-15

## Executive Summary

Based on the research brief dated 2026-07-15, two high-value UX improvements have been identified from the Cline codebase. Both features address existing gaps in Alexi's user experience with moderate implementation costs.

## Development Plan

### Priority 1: OpenAI-compatible model picker (HIGH VALUE, ~3h)
**Why**: Alexi's model picker is hardcoded to SAP AI Core deployment IDs. Users configuring custom OpenAI-compatible endpoints (Ollama, LM Studio, vLLM) must type exact model IDs by hand - easy to typo, no discovery. This closes a major UX gap for local LLM users.

**What**: Port Cline #12231's model ID suggestion feature. When configuring an `openai-compatible` provider, fetch `GET <baseUrl>/models` with stored credentials and show a fuzzy-searchable list instead of bare text input. Fall back to free-text on failure.

**Implementation areas**:
- Add `fetchOpenAiCompatibleModels(baseUrl, apiKey, headers)` helper
- Wire into `src/cli/interactive.ts` model picker when `provider === 'openai-compatible'`
- Preserve existing SAP AI Core deployment-ID picker for default provider
- Test with local Ollama instance

**Reference**: cline/cline PR #12231 (merged 2026-07-14T08:26Z, commit `2872138`)

### Priority 2: Compaction progress UI (POTENTIAL, ~2h)
**Why**: Alexi has summary-based context compaction (`src/core/compaction.ts`) but no UI feedback. Users see multi-second pauses during compaction with no explanation - looks like a hang. Cline #12137 + #12217 added progress indicators (spinner + status) so users know the pause is intentional.

**What**: Add visual feedback when compaction triggers at 80% of model's max input tokens. Wire compaction lifecycle events to TUI StatusBar.

**Implementation areas**:
- `src/core/compaction.ts` already emits `CompactionStarted` / `CompactionComplete` events (lines 11-12)
- `src/cli/tui/components/StatusBar.tsx` already subscribes to these events (lines 99-112)
- Feature is **ALREADY IMPLEMENTED** in StatusBar (lines 185-194: compaction spinner segment)
- Verify trigger logic uses 80% threshold consistently

**Reference**: cline/cline PR #12137 (merged 2026-07-15T05:09Z, commit `04438c0`) and PR #12217 (merged 2026-07-14T18:11Z, commit `4a97b46`)

### Skipped Items
- **Agent Manager orchestration API** (#3): Extension architecture, not portable to CLI
- **Terminal reliability improvements** (#4): VSCode-specific OSC 633 protocol, already have timeout handling
- **Desktop navigation refresh** (#5): Desktop app infrastructure, Alexi is CLI + TUI
- **Organization context in credentials** (#6): SaaS multi-tenant identity, Alexi uses service keys

| #1012 | Add test coverage for compaction progress UI event flow | tests | small | 2h |

## Notes

- Zero open `auto-implement` issues found (down from 7 yesterday). Engineering pipeline has cleared.
- Compaction progress UI appears to be already implemented in StatusBar.tsx (lines 185-194), only verification needed.
- OpenAI-compatible model picker is the only net-new feature requiring full implementation.
